$schema_note: RESUMEN de prompts de assets. Para trabajar por lotes usa la carpeta docs/prompts/ (un .json por lote, con estado pendiente/hecho y un item por imagen). Este archivo se mantiene como vista general. Los tiers del avatar tienen prompts completos en docs/avatar-tiers-prompts.md.

style_base.type: 3D Pixar-style chibi / polished premium mobile-game asset
style_base.rendering: octane render, soft studio lighting, smooth subsurface shading, high detail, clean glossy finish
style_base.world: dark-fantasy magical jungle kingdom ('el reino de la luz'): misty jungle, faceted low-poly rocks, glowing teal runes, warm lanterns, fireflies
negative_always: keep chibi proportions where characters appear

avatar_tiers.note: NO regenerar desde aquí: usar docs/avatar-tiers-prompts.md (prompts completos con identity-lock, escala de equipo por tier y flujo image-to-image). Archivos destino: public/avatars/tiers/tier-0.png … tier-4.png (hoy solo existe tier-0). Tras generar la escena 9:16, pedir además el recorte con fondo transparente para el componente de avatar.

selectable_avatars.note: Nuevos héroes seleccionables en AvatarPicker (hoy solo hay 2: rulo y dani). Cada uno necesita DOS archivos: bust crop transparente (~512x512) para el picker y cuerpo completo transparente (~9:16) para el hero del Dashboard. Destino: public/avatars/<slug>-avatar.png y <slug>-full.png, registrar en AVATAR_OPTIONS de src/constants/config.ts.
selectable_avatars.shared_prompt_body: 3D Pixar-style chibi mascot, big head small body short limbs, octane render, soft studio lighting, premium mobile-game character, standing confidently, warm friendly expression, transparent background PNG, full body visible, dark-fantasy jungle-explorer outfit (fitted shirt, tribal sash with wooden beads, explorer shorts, gladiator sandals, blue crystal pendant), teal and gold color accents

characters.prompt_addon: young woman explorer, long braided copper-red hair, freckles, bright green eyes, confident smirk, carries a short carved wooden bow on her back
young east-asian man, short black hair with an undercut, calm focused expression, thin scar over one eyebrow, holds a simple bo staff
black woman with voluminous natural afro hair adorned with tiny golden beads, radiant smile, gold hoop earrings, carries a satchel of glowing herbs
non-binary explorer with silver-grey short wavy hair, heterochromatic eyes (one teal, one amber), serene expression, small floating teal wisp companion by their shoulder

achievement_illustrations.note: Emblema/insignia por logro (hoy se usan iconos Lucide; estas ilustraciones suben la calidad del modal de logro). Formato: 1024x1024, fondo transparente, estilo medallón. Destino sugerido: public/achievements/<key>.png. El marco cambia por tier: bronze = marco de bronce simple, silver = marco plateado con detalle, gold = marco dorado ornamentado con gemas, platinum = marco platino radiante con aura.
achievement_illustrations.shared_prompt_body: ornate fantasy achievement medallion, 3D rendered game badge, centered emblem on a shield-shaped backplate, jungle-kingdom dark-fantasy style, teal and gold palette, glowing details, transparent background, premium mobile-game quality, no text

badges.emblem: a glowing teal target with an arrow striking the center, wrapped in small jungle vines
two interlocked glowing check marks forming a crown shape
a radiant golden laurel wreath around a glowing habit rune
a small lightning bolt striking a seven-notched stone tablet
a burning teal-orange flame held in a stone gauntlet
a golden crown floating above a full moon calendar disc
an eternal flame trophy with orbiting runic shards and an electric-blue aura
a single glowing gold star rising from an open hand
a constellation of five connected glowing stars
a supernova of golden sparkles bursting from a crystal core
a luminous teal butterfly with wing patterns shaped like two joined hands
three glowing figures connected by threads of golden light
a stylized golden bird taking flight over a rising sun
a wise owl with glowing teal eyes perched on a crescent moon
a flawless glowing circle of light with a check mark core, framed by dawn rays
a phoenix of teal-gold fire rising from grey ashes

life_area_icons.note: Ilustraciones/emblemas por reino de la vida (hoy se usan iconos Lucide). 1024x1024, fondo transparente, estilo gema/tótem de reino. Destino: public/life-areas/<area>.png.
life_area_icons.shared_prompt_body: mystical kingdom totem gem, 3D rendered, faceted crystal core with a carved stone frame and jungle vines, teal and gold dark-fantasy palette, soft inner glow, transparent background, premium mobile-game quality, no text

areas.emblem: a heart-shaped emerald crystal with a gentle pulse of light and a leaf motif
an amber-gold coin crystal with an engraved rune of abundance
a violet-teal crystal shaped like a flame-brush, with floating ink sparks
two intertwined teal crystals forming a bond, connected by a thread of light
a warm rose-gold crystal cluster of one large and two small gems sheltered under a stone arch
a deep-blue crystal mountain peak with a golden summit flag rune

scenes_and_marketing.note: Escenas de apoyo. 9:16 verticales salvo indicación. Reusar la escena de selva del style_base para coherencia.

items.prompt: misty magical jungle clearing at dawn, an empty stone pedestal with a floating glowing teal rune inviting the viewer to begin their journey, warm god-rays, fireflies, no characters, 9:16, dark-fantasy premium mobile-game splash art
a great teal-orange bonfire burning bright on a stone altar in the magical jungle at night, golden sparks rising into the canopy, celebratory mood, no characters, 9:16

wide banner: the chibi hero from public/avatars/hero-avatar.png standing on a jungle cliff at golden hour overlooking a glowing rune-lit valley, epic but friendly, teal and gold palette, room on the left third for logo overlay, 1200x630, no text

cleanup_orphans.note: Assets huérfanos en public/avatars/ que ya no referencia el código (AVATAR_OPTIONS solo usa hero-avatar/dani-avatar/dani-full/hero-character). Borrar o reciclar al generar los nuevos:
files: public/avatars/avatar-explorer-3.png (¡OJO: es la referencia de cara para los tiers — conservar!)
